requirement: the format specification is internally consistent

findings.observation: ratingScale ownership is consistent across statements: a Target MUST NOT declare ratingScale and the Target schema omits it.
Factor-connection rules agree across their positive and negative statements (every requirement connected to a factor; direct-target requirements MUST declare factors).
Leaf and grouping roll-up definitions compose without contradiction (leaf aggregate equals local; grouping aggregate derives from children).
The Appendix B example agrees with the rules it illustrates: two rating levels (>=2 minimum), required level/criterion present, optional title omitted, requirement placement-connected to its factor.

rationale: No two statements contradict; one term denotes one concept throughout and worked examples track the rules they illustrate across a large document. Satisfies the requirement at target.
